column4:
{{c1::真情像草原广阔}}
{{c2::层层风雨不能阻隔}}
{{c3::总有云开日出时候}}
{{c4::万丈阳光照耀你我}}
column5:
zhēn qíng xiàng cǎo yuán guǎng kuò
céng céng fēng yǔ bù néng zǔ gé
zǒng yǒu yún kāi rì chū shí hòu
wàn zhàng yáng guāng zhào yào nǐ wǒ
column6:
True love is as vast as the grassland
Layer upon layer of wind and rain cannot block it
There always comes a time when the clouds part and the sun rises
Ten-thousand-zhang sunlight shines on you and me
column7: 真 (true) 情 (feeling) 像 (like) 草 (grass) 原 (plain) 广 (wide) 阔 (broad) 层 (layer) 风 (wind) 雨 (rain) 不 (no) 能 (can) 阻 (hinder) 隔 (separate) 总 (always) 有 (have) 云 (cloud) 开 (open) 日 (sun) 出 (out) 时 (time) 候 (wait) 万 (ten thousand) 丈 (ten feet) 阳 (sun) 光 (light) 照 (shine) 耀 (brilliant) 你 (you) 我 (i)

column4:
{{c1::真情像梅花开过}}
{{c2::冷冷冰雪不能掩没}}
{{c3::就在最冷枝头绽放}}
{{c4::看见春天走向你我}}
column5:
zhēn qíng xiàng méi huā kāi guò
lěng lěng bīng xuě bù néng yǎn méi
jiù zài zuì lěng zhī tóu zhàn fàng
kàn jiàn chūn tiān zǒu xiàng nǐ wǒ
column6:
True love is like plum blossoms that once bloomed
The coldest ice and snow cannot bury it
On the very coldest branch it bursts into bloom
Seeing spring walking toward you and me
column7: 真 (true) 情 (feeling) 像 (like) 梅 (plum) 花 (flower) 开 (open) 过 (past-particle) 冷 (cold) 冰 (ice) 雪 (snow) 不 (no) 能 (can) 掩 (cover up) 没 (not) 就 (just) 在 (at) 最 (most) 枝 (branch) 头 (head) 绽 (burst open) 放 (release) 看 (see) 见 (see) 春 (spring) 天 (sky) 走 (walk) 向 (toward) 你 (you) 我 (i)

column4:
{{c1::雪花飘飘北风啸啸}}
{{c2::天地一片苍茫}}
{{c3::一剪寒梅傲立雪中}}
{{c4::只为伊人飘香}}
column5:
xuě huā piāo piāo běi fēng xiào xiào
tiān dì yī piàn cāng máng
yī jiǎn hán méi ào lì xuě zhōng
zhǐ wèi yī rén piāo xiāng
column6:
Snowflakes drift, the north wind howls
Heaven and earth — a single vast expanse
A single sprig of cold plum stands proud in the snow
Only for that beloved one does it spread its fragrance
column7: 雪 (snow) 花 (flower) 飘 (float) 北 (north) 风 (wind) 啸 (howl) 天 (sky) 地 (earth) 一 (one) 片 (stretch) 苍 (dark blue) 茫 (vast) 剪 (cut) 寒 (cold) 梅 (plum) 傲 (proud) 立 (stand) 中 (middle) 只 (only) 为 (for) 伊 (that) 人 (person) 香 (fragrant)

column4:
{{c1::爱我所爱无怨无悔}}
{{c2::此情长留心间}}
column5:
ài wǒ suǒ ài wú yuàn wú huǐ
cǐ qíng zhǎng liú xīn jiān
column6:
I love what I love, with no complaint, no regret
This feeling will linger in the heart forever
column7: 爱 (love) 我 (i) 所 (place) 无 (without) 怨 (blame) 悔 (regret) 此 (this) 情 (feeling) 长 (long) 留 (stay) 心 (heart) 间 (between)
